name: Eye of Skadi
description: Extremely rare artifact, guarded by the azure dragons.

abilities.name: Cold Attack
abilities.description: The wielder's attacks apply a movement speed and attack speed slow on enemy units. Move Speed Slow: 25%. Attack Speed Slow: 20%. Duration: 3. Health Restore Reduction: 50%. Move Speed Slow: 50%. The frigid attacks also reduce the effectiveness of healing and health restoration on the targets.
